queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account correlates with reduced default probability in consumer credit risk assessment.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: investigating how negative checking account balances function as a credit risk driver associated with lower borrower risk.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Statistical impact of the requested credit amount on default probability and its role as a credit risk driver in decreasing overall portfolio risk.
